query:
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES ('buba-davis-liota', 'Buba Davis', 'buba.aragon@gmail.com', 'manual', 'admin', NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = 'Buba Davis',
  email = 'buba.aragon@gmail.com',
  role = 'admin',
  updatedAt = NOW();
